items.title: Bhutan ‘doesn’t recall’ selling any bitcoin, disputing widely-tracked $1 billion BTC drawdown
items.summary: Arkham Intelligence data shows that over $1 billion in bitcoin has left wallets attributed to Bhutan in the past year, flowing to exchanges and trading firms. The country says it has not sold any.

items.title: US CLARITY Act brings ‘major spike of euphoria’ to Bitcoin: Santiment
items.summary: Santiment warned that the crypto market “typically” moves against crowd expectations, pointing to a recent rise in bullish sentiment driven by renewed momentum around the US CLARITY Act.

items.title: House committee leaders urge Trump to nominate CFTC members, citing CLARITY Act
items.summary: The US Commodity Futures Trading Commission is currently headed by Chair Michael Selig, with no public statement from Donald Trump about fully staffing the five-member panel of commissioners.

items.title: Bitcoin Depot filing casts doubt on company’s future amid lawsuits
items.summary: The crypto ATM company reported financial difficulties amid a changing regulatory environment and ongoing litigation, which have cost it millions of dollars.

items.title: ICE, CME press US regulators to 'rein in' Hyperliquid energy trading: Report
items.summary: The Hyperliquid decentralized exchange allows anyone who stakes 500,000 HYPE tokens, valued at roughly $22.2 million, to deploy new markets.

items.title: U.S. House lawmakers who oversee the CFTC are urging Trump to fill the commission
items.summary: As the Commodity Futures Trading Commission takes on a growing task to police U.S. crypto trading, senior lawmakers are saying it needs bipartisan leadership.

items.title: Solayer launches Visa-compatible card for USDC payments
items.summary: The new card lets users spend USDC balances through online, in-store and contactless transactions while accessing ATM withdrawals in supported regions.

items.title: Drake Calls for Sam Bankman-Fried's Release in New, Critically Panned Album
items.summary: Rapper Drake released three new albums on Friday, and described himself on one as “a BTC crypto big-timer.”

items.title: Lombard Finance Dumps LayerZero, Will Use Chainlink to Power $1 Billion in Bitcoin Assets
items.summary: The Bitcoin DeFi protocol is moving its assets away from LayerZero following the Kelp DAO exploit that led to the loss of $292 million.

items.title: Hyperliquid Policy Arm Rejects Market Integrity Concerns Amid Oil Futures Surge
items.summary: Decentralized exchange Hyperliquid has become a popular destination for speculating on oil prices.

items.title: SpaceX targets June 11 IPO pricing, picks Nasdaq for historic market debut

items.title: President Trump Discloses Coinbase, Robinhood and Bitcoin Mining Stock Trades

items.title: Packs of Empty Waymos Are Weirding Out Atlanta Neighborhood

items.summary: Law firm Gerstein Harrow LLP is attempting to claim frozen cryptocurrency funds for claimants of unrelated judgments stretching back decades.

items.title: Bitcoin Depot Flashes Bankruptcy Warning as ATM Revenue Falls, Regulatory Scrutiny Grows
items.summary: Bitcoin Depot issued a “going concern” warning, signaling severe uncertainty over its ability to survive the next 12 months.

items.title: Bitwise launches US-listed Hyperliquid fund with staking rewards

items.title: AI Agents Turn to Digital Arson, Crime in Shared Virtual World: Study
items.summary: In new research, Emergence AI said autonomous AI agents became more violent, deceptive, and unstable during weeks-long simulations designed to study long-term behavior.

items.title: Myanmar’s military government proposes life in prison for crypto scammers
items.summary: The text of Myanmar’s Anti-Online Fraud Bill said that anyone who was convicted of committing “digital currency fraud” could face from ten years to life in prison, and possibly the death penalty.

items.title: Saudi Arabia is tokenizing its multi-trillion dollar economy to protect its wealth from global shocks
